home.title: Detect vulnerabilities before hackers do
home.subtitle: Analyze your website security in minutes. Professional scanning engine with 50+ attack vectors, AI-powered explanations and PDF reports ready for audits.
home.step4_desc: Download a professional report for audits
home.vulnerabilities_desc: Our engine analyzes multiple security categories
home.pricing_desc: Choose the plan that best fits your needs
home.faq_q1: How long does a scan take?
home.faq_a1: Most scans complete in 2-5 minutes, depending on the size and complexity of your website.
home.faq_q2: Is it safe to scan my website?
home.faq_a2: Yes, our scan is passive and doesn't modify or damage your website. It only analyzes headers, certificates and configuration.
home.faq_a3: Yes, all plans include PDF report downloads with executive summary and recommendations.
home.faq_a4: Basic plan allows 10 scans/month, Professional 100/month, and Enterprise unlimited scans.

scan.title: New scan
scan.subtitle: Enter your website URL to analyze its security
scan.owner_confirmation: I confirm that I am the owner or have permission to analyze this website
scan.terms_accepted: I accept the terms of use and privacy policy
scan.no_vulnerabilities: Excellent! No critical vulnerabilities were found.
scan.report_locked_desc: Unlock the full report to see all vulnerabilities and recommendations.
scan.login_required_desc: You need an account to perform security analysis.
